action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Zimmerman, Behnke, Allen, Mursau, Kaufert, Steffen, Dittrich, Emerson, Tusler, Sinicki, Madison, O'Connor, Vining, Wichgers and Murphy; 
cosponsored by Senators Wimberger, James, Dassler-Alfheim, Feyen, Keyeski, Larson, Marklein, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Cabral-Guevara
